concerns.text: FR-010 requires metadata (accession IDs, checksums, DOI) to be retained for 5 years. Plan Phase 11 mentions writing DOI to `metadata.json` but does not explicitly state the 5-year retention requirement for the metadata file itself, only the 90-day retention for FASTQ.

FR-011 specifies an optional CLI flag `--max-replicates 5`. The Quickstart config shows `max_replicates: 3` but does not mention the CLI flag or the ability to set it to 5, which may leave the implementer unaware of this option.
